current_fail_closed_findings: The committed visual harness does not satisfy the 16-view layered PVP-005 contract.
No genuine first-six-frame blinded human judgments exist.

evidence_policy: Historical reports retain their evaluated revisions. New PVP-005 evidence must name an exact reachable source revision and must not combine outputs from different source revisions.
